sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101217" key="su=r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῦρ</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σῠρός, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n101217.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φορτίον</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">133</biblScope> </bibl>; but Hdn.Gr. has only <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Σῦρ</foreign>, an old name for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Φοινίκη</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.910</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">919</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
